headlines.title: OPEC’s Oil Demand Bet Is on India, Not Europe

headlines.title: Oil Prices Are Crashing. Inventories Tell A Different Story.

headlines.title: High Tanker Rates Disrupt Persian Gulf Oil Shipments to Asia

headlines.title: India's Pump Prices Stuck Even As Global Crude Crashes
headlines.summary: India’s fuel prices will remain elevated for some time despite the declining international crude prices, according to India’s Union Minister of State for Petroleum and Natural Gas, Suresh Gopi.
